text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I come across Symboli Rudolf in the
cafeteria, sitting in front of a veritable buffet of
dishes.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer. What an unexpected pleasure.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Quite the sight, isn't it? These are new dishes that
the chef has... cooked up, if you'll excuse the pun.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The academy staff are constantly searching for
new ways to make campus life more enjoyable for
the students.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That includes revising the cafeteria menu from
time to time. It's hard to overstate the debt we
owe them.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as we share a common goal, I thought the
least I could do is lend a hand...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Which is why I have offered to serve as a
taste-tester.
choice_data_list: Don't you think this is a bit much?
Don't you think this is a bit much?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Which is why I have offered to serve as a
taste-tester.
choice_data_list: Don't you think this is a bit much?
Don't you think this is a bit much?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. I appreciate the chef's enthusiasm, but I
can't possibly finish all this.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Still, now that I have offered my assistance, I
have to make good on my word. What to do...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: But of course. How silly of me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If I wanted to find somebody who cares deeply
for Umamusume, I didn't have to look far, did I?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: By all means, I would welcome your assistance.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
With our combined efforts, we can make this
cafeteria the best it can be!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf and I spend the rest of the day
sampling a variety of dishes.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Quite. There are a formidable number of dishes to
get through, and they all seem awfully filling...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But if this will help create a menu that can satisfy
the students' appetites, I'll do all I can.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
First up, we have... the Deluxe Shrimp Alfredo
Pasta Bowl!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the sake of the academy's hungry students,
Symboli Rudolf pushes her stomach to the limit.
